data.title: As a sprint/debug-everything/fix-bug orchestrator, skill consumers handle new MAX_AGENTS protocol
data.description:
## Description

**What**: Update all orchestration skill consumers to parse and act on MAX_AGENTS: unlimited|N|0
**Why**: These skills are the downstream consumers of the protocol change in agent-batch-lifecycle.sh
**Scope**:
- IN: sprint/SKILL.md (~line 509), debug-everything/SKILL.md (~line 669), fix-bug/SKILL.md (lines 974-987 — mandatory, not optional), validate-work/SKILL.md (lines 102-103, 366)
- OUT: check-usage.sh (Story 2), lifecycle protocol (Story 3), CLAUDE.md text (Story 5)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, sprint handles MAX_AGENTS: unlimited (no cap on batch size), N (cap at N), 0 (skip dispatch + write ticket comment with utilization % and reset time)
  ← Satisfies: "orchestration skills limit sub-agent dispatch to 1 agent" and "orchestration skills pause sub-agent dispatch"
- When this story is complete, fix-bug/SKILL.md no longer contains hardcoded "batches of 5" or "batch of up to 5 fix agents" — it references the MAX_AGENTS protocol instead
  ← Satisfies: "CLAUDE.md rule #4 replaced with usage-aware throttling guidance"
- When this story is complete, validate-work/SKILL.md no longer contains hardcoded "5 sub-agents" references — it references the MAX_AGENTS protocol or orchestration.max_agents config
  ← Satisfies: "CLAUDE.md rule #4 replaced with usage-aware throttling guidance"
- When this story is complete, debug-everything handles the same 3-value protocol as sprint; explicitly documents whether context-check integration is needed (decision: document rationale if excluded)
  ← Satisfies: "orchestration skills limit sub-agent dispatch to 1 agent"
- When this story is complete, a test confirms that with MAX_AGENTS: unlimited and no config cap, a batch of 10 independent stories dispatches 10 concurrent sub-agents with no intervening commit/push steps
  ← Satisfies: "batch of 10 independent stories dispatches 10 concurrent sub-agents"
- When this story is complete, unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic
  ← Satisfies: TDD DoD

## Considerations

- [Maintainability] Coordinated update across 4 skill files — ensure consistent vocabulary
- [Testing] Integration test for >5 agents requires mock or controlled environment
- [Reliability] debug-everything context-check asymmetry: decide whether it needs context-check gating like sprint, or if pre-check alone is sufficient (document rationale)
